en: Let brotherly love continue.
zh: 你們總要保持弟兄的愛。

en: Do not neglect to show hospitality to strangers, for thereby some have entertained angels unawares.
zh: 不要忘了用愛心接待人，有人就是這樣作，在無意中就款待了天使。

en: Remember those who are in prison, as though in prison with them, and those who are mistreated, since you also are in the body.
zh: 你們要記念那些被囚禁的人，好像跟他們一起被囚禁；也要記念那些受虐待的人，好像你們也親自受過。

en: Let marriage be held in honor among all, and let the marriage bed be undefiled, for God will judge the sexually immoral and adulterous.
zh: 人人都應該尊重婚姻，婚床也不要玷污，因為 神一定審判淫亂的和姦淫的人。

en: Keep your life free from love of money, and be content with what you have, for he has said, "I will never leave you nor forsake you."
zh: 你們為人不要貪愛錢財，要以現在所有的為滿足；因為 神親自說過：“我決不撇下你，也不離棄你。”

en: So we can confidently say, "The Lord is my helper; I will not fear; what can man do to me?"
zh: 所以我們可以放膽說： “主是我的幫助， 我決不害怕， 人能把我怎麼樣呢？”

en: Remember your leaders, those who spoke to you the word of God. Consider the outcome of their way of life, and imitate their faith.
zh: 你們要記念那些領導過你們，把 神的道傳給你們的人；你們要觀察他們一生的成果，要效法他們的信心。

en: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
zh: 耶穌基督昨天、今天、一直到永遠都是一樣的。

en: Do not be led away by diverse and strange teachings, for it is good for the heart to be strengthened by grace, not by foods, which have not benefited those devoted to them.
zh: 你們不要被各樣怪異的教訓勾引去了。人心靠著恩典，而不是靠著食物得到堅定，才是好的；因為那些拘守食物的人，從來沒有得過益處。

en: We have an altar from which those who serve the tent have no right to eat.
zh: 我們有一座祭壇，壇上的祭物，是那些在會幕中供職的人沒有權利吃的。

en: For the bodies of those animals whose blood is brought into the holy places by the high priest as a sacrifice for sin are burned outside the camp.
zh: 那些祭牲的血，由大祭司帶進聖所作贖罪祭，祭牲的身體卻要在營外焚燒。

en: So Jesus also suffered outside the gate in order to sanctify the people through his own blood.
zh: 所以耶穌也是這樣在城門外受苦，為的是要藉著自己的血使人民成聖。

en: Therefore let us go to him outside the camp and bear the reproach he endured.
zh: 那麼，讓我們也出到營外到他那裡去，擔當他的凌辱。

en: For here we have no lasting city, but we seek the city that is to come.
zh: 因為在這裡我們沒有長存的城，我們卻是尋求那將要來的城。

en: Through him then let us continually offer up a sacrifice of praise to God, that is, the fruit of lips that acknowledge his name.
zh: 所以，我們要藉著耶穌，常常把頌讚的祭品獻給 神，這就是承認他的名的人嘴唇的果子。

en: Do not neglect to do good and to share what you have, for such sacrifices are pleasing to God.
zh: 你們也不要忘記行善和捐輸，這樣的祭是 神所喜悅的。

en: Obey your leaders and submit to them, for they are keeping watch over your souls, as those who will have to give an account. Let them do this with joy and not with groaning, for that would be of no advantage to you.
zh: 你們要聽從那些領導你們的人，也要順服他們；因為他們為你們的靈魂警醒，好像要交帳的人一樣。你們要使他們交帳的時候快快樂樂，不至於歎息；如果他們歎息，對你們就沒有好處了。

en: Pray for us, for we are sure that we have a clear conscience, desiring to act honorably in all things.
zh: 請為我們禱告，因為我們深信自己良心無虧，願意凡事遵行正道。

en: I urge you the more earnestly to do this in order that I may be restored to you the sooner.
zh: 我更加要求你們為我們禱告，好使我們能夠快點回到你們那裡去。

en: Now may the God of peace who brought again from the dead our Lord Jesus, the great shepherd of the sheep, by the blood of the eternal covenant,
zh: 願賜平安的 神，就是那憑著永約的血，把群羊的大牧人我們的主耶穌，從死人中領出來的那一位，

en: equip you with everything good that you may do his will, working in us that which is pleasing in his sight, through Jesus Christ, to whom be glory forever and ever. Amen.
zh: 在一切善事上成全你們，好使你們遵行他的旨意；又藉著耶穌基督在我們裡面，行他所喜悅的事。願榮耀歸給他，直到永永遠遠。阿們。

en: I appeal to you, brothers, bear with my word of exhortation, for I have written to you briefly.
zh: 弟兄們，我勸你們耐心接受我這勸勉的話，因為我只是簡略地寫給你們。

en: You should know that our brother Timothy has been released, with whom I shall see you if he comes soon.
zh: 你們要知道，我們的弟兄提摩太已經釋放了；如果他來得早，我就跟他一起去看你們。

en: Greet all your leaders and all the saints. Those who come from Italy send you greetings.
zh: 請問候所有領導你們的人和所有聖徒。從意大利來的人也問候你們。

en: Grace be with all of you.
zh: 願恩惠與你們眾人同在。
